scripts.test:bots: concurrently --kill-others --names "server,client,bots" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "node server/botWaiter.js 3"

scripts.test:bots:5: concurrently --kill-others --names "server,client,bots" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "node server/botWaiter.js 5"
scripts.test:bots:9: concurrently --kill-others --names "server,client,bots" -c "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "node server/botWaiter.js 9"
